author: y4rr
content: [action] Audit-fix Phase 1 dispatch: BN running-stats elision cluster (#1024-#1027). Replace let _ = running_mean / running_var lines in 4 tests with set_running_mean/var calls + round-trip getter assertion. Use Phase 2's setter API. Lazy-BN test (#1027) hand-computes post-training running stats via momentum formula if fixture lacks them. STOP-AND-REPORT on Phase 2 API anomalies.
